title: Nolan Center / Wrangell Visitor Center
summary: The James & Elsie Nolan Center is the ideal escape for meetings, brainstorming sessions or retreats. The natural solitude of Wrangell encourages effective meetings and creative thought. Wrangell is a short 2 hour flight from Seattle. 296 Campbell Drive Wrangell, AK 99929 See map: Google Maps
